metadata.description: 6 PRs closing GitHub issues before the GCP factorial study. PRs 1-3 are pre-factorial blockers; PRs 4-6 run parallel with the ~1.5-day factorial. Each PR uses self-learning-iterative-coder TDD (RED-GREEN-VERIFY-FIX-CHECKPOINT-CONVERGE).

cost-summary.factorial-cost: Factorial (unblocked by PR-1): ~$65 spot (72 training runs on GCP L4; post-training + eval + biostatistics run locally on RTX 2070 Super 8GB — all models fit for inference)

dependency-graph.parallelism: PR-1, PR-2, PR-3 (ALL truly parallel, start simultaneously)

cold-start.step: Group A: PR-1, PR-2, PR-3 ALL in parallel
Group B: PR-4 + PR-5 in parallel
Each PR: branch, TDD, make test-staging, commit, push, PR

pr.name: HPO Grid Partitioning + Docker Pull Optimization

task.title: Test: PARALLEL allocation returns disjoint trial partitions
task.description: allocate(strategy="PARALLEL", total_cells=24, worker_id=0, total_workers=4) returns 6 cells with no overlap across workers.

task.title: Implement grid partitioning in hpo_flow.py
task.description: Modular arithmetic: cell_index % total_workers == worker_id. Grid worker invokes train flow via Prefect run_deployment() or hpo_flow with sampler="grid" (Optuna GridSampler). NOT a standalone script (Rule #17).

task.title: Test: factorial config defines 24 cells
task.acceptance: Fails because paper_factorial.yaml does not exist.

task.title: Create factorial YAML + SkyPilot task YAML
task.description: 24-cell factorial config (Hydra sweep). SkyPilot YAML with image_id: docker:... and run: python -m minivess.orchestration.flows.hpo_flow (Prefect module).
task.acceptance: T1.3 passes. SkyPilot uses Docker image_id.

task.title: MLflow provenance tags (grid_config_hash, git_sha, docker_image_digest)
task.acceptance: Tags present in mock MLflow client.

task.title: Test: GAR remote repository config is valid
task.description: Validate Pulumi GAR remote repo in europe-north1. Validate SkyPilot file_mounts with mode: MOUNT_CACHED.
task.acceptance: Fails because GAR remote repo config does not exist.

task.title: Add GAR remote repo cache + SkyPilot MOUNT_CACHED
task.description: Pulumi GAR remote repo caching nvidia base layers. SkyPilot MOUNT_CACHED for data (avoids re-download on spot preemption).

task.title: Update KG hpo_engine node to grid partitioning resolved

pr.guardrails: - Grid worker uses Prefect flow module, NOT standalone script (Rule #17) - SkyPilot uses image_id: docker:... (bare VM BANNED) - No Optuna ask-tell or PostgreSQL trials (deferred to PR-1b) - GAR remote repo in europe-north1

pr.name: Compliance and Regulatory

task.title: Test: train flow calls log_data_access(dataset_name, file_paths)
task.description: Patch AuditTrail. Assert log_data_access() called with dataset_name: str and file_paths: list[str] (NOT split names).
task.acceptance: Fails because train_flow does not call log_data_access().

task.title: Wire log_data_access() into train flow
task.description: Call log_data_access(dataset_name=..., file_paths=[...]) after each split loads. Signature: (dataset_name: str, file_paths: list[str], *, actor: str).

task.title: Test: ModelCard generates valid HuggingFace YAML
task.acceptance: Fails because ModelCard class does not exist.

task.title: Implement ModelCard generator
task.description: Reads MLflow run, generates YAML front matter + Markdown body.

task.title: Test: LineageEmitter sends valid OpenLineage events
task.description: Mock Marquez HTTP API. Validate OpenLineage v2 schema.
task.acceptance: Fails because Marquez transport not configured.

task.title: Configure HttpTransport + update IEC 62304 matrix
task.description: HttpTransport to MARQUEZ_URL env var. Add MARQUEZ_URL to .env.example. Update IEC 62304 traceability matrix.

pr.guardrails: - log_data_access() takes (dataset_name: str, file_paths: list[str]), NOT split names - Marquez emission is mock-tested only (full deployment deferred) - MARQUEZ_URL in .env.example

pr.name: Observability Stubs and KG Fix

task.title: Test: Sentry/PostHog init when env vars set, no-op otherwise
task.acceptance: Fails because init_sentry()/init_posthog() do not exist.

task.title: Implement stubs + .env.example vars
task.description: Lazy imports (optional deps). SENTRY_DSN= and POSTHOG_KEY= in .env.example.

task.title: Fix agent_architecture.yaml: LangGraph to Pydantic AI
Add CISO Assistant note to compliance_posture
Test: updated KG YAML files parse correctly
task.acceptance: KG YAML files parse. Required keys present.

pr.guardrails: - Sentry/PostHog are optional deps (lazy import, no ImportError) - Both disabled by default (empty env vars = no-op)

pr.name: Agentic Dashboard

task.title: Test: CopilotKit docker-compose service config valid
task.acceptance: Fails because copilotkit service not in docker-compose.

task.title: Test: AG-UI adapter translates WebMCP messages
task.acceptance: Fails because adapter does not exist.

task.title: Pydantic AI dashboard agent + Flow 5 wiring
task.description: Agent with MLflow query, DuckDB aggregation, OpenLineage retrieval tools.
task.acceptance: Dashboard agent responds to MLflow queries in mock tests.

pr.guardrails: - CopilotKit is a Docker service, not standalone Node.js - Dashboard agent uses Pydantic AI (NOT LangGraph) - Lineage display is read-only

pr.name: KG-Enrichment Agent

task.title: Test: PubMed search returns structured metadata
task.acceptance: Fails because search_pubmed() does not exist.

task.title: Entity extraction from abstracts (Pydantic AI structured output)
task.acceptance: Extracts model_family, loss, metrics from sample abstracts.

task.title: Test: contradiction detector flags KG conflicts
task.description: Mock KG: "T4 banned for SAM3". Propose T4. Assert flagged.
task.acceptance: Fails because contradiction detector does not exist.

task.title: KG update proposals + contradiction detection
task.description: Human review gate: proposals saved for manual approval.

pr.guardrails: - PubMed rate limit: 3 req/s (NCBI policy) - Entity extraction uses Pydantic AI, not regex - KG updates NEVER auto-applied

pr.name: Research Agents

task.title: Conformal bandit acquisition agent
task.description: Conformal prediction uncertainty. Thompson sampling. PCCP budget constraint.
task.acceptance: Selects high-uncertainty volumes in mock tests.

task.title: Active learning annotation agent
task.acceptance: Ranks volumes by disagreement in mock tests.

task.title: Self-evolving segmentation agent (TissueLab pattern)
task.description: Monitors drift, triggers retraining via Prefect deployment.

pr.guardrails: - All agents use Pydantic AI (NOT LangGraph) - PCCP enforcement mandatory for ALL agent actions - Agents NEVER modify data/models without human approval - Self-evolving uses Prefect deployments (Rule #17)

success-criteria.criterion: make test-staging passes after each PR merge
make test-prod passes after all 6 PRs merged
Grid partitioning produces disjoint cell sets (unit tested)
GAR remote repo cache in europe-north1 (Pulumi preview succeeds)

deferred.item: Optuna PARALLEL ask-tell API + PostgreSQL distributed trials (HPO Phase 2).
Full Marquez deployment with PostgreSQL. PR-2 does mock-tested emission only.
Syne Tune integration (HPO Phase 3). Requires D-1 complete.

out-of-scope.item: GCP factorial GPU runs (#789, after PR-1)
